_comment: Official Datadog (Bits AI) managed MCP server — remote, Streamable HTTP at mcp.datadoghq.com. This server EXPOSES WRITE TOOLS (mute/create/update/delete monitors, schedule/cancel downtime) — read-only is NOT a config flag: grant the Datadog Application Key only the 'MCP Read' scope (or create it under a read-only user), see SETUP.md. Auth uses DD-API-KEY + DD-APPLICATION-KEY headers (add them to your local config; never commit keys). Pick your regional endpoint. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
